architecture.summary: Pure rename refactor within existing Next.js 15 app. No architectural changes. URL paths rename with 301 redirects in next.config.ts. DB schema and API endpoints unchanged.

integrations.summary: N/A - No new integrations. API v1 endpoints kept at /api/v1/authors/* for CLI backwards compatibility. KV cache key values unchanged.

ui-ux.summary: Authors renamed to Publishers in nav, page titles, components. Skill display changed to publisher/skill-name clickable format. AuthorLink becomes PublisherLink.

performance.summary: N/A - Pure rename, no performance impact. No new queries or data fetching changes.

security.summary: N/A - No auth, permission, or data handling changes. Pure UI/code rename.

edge-cases.summary: 301 redirects ensure old /authors/* URLs continue working. API v1 paths unchanged for CLI compatibility. Existing KV cache keys preserved to avoid cache invalidation.
